# Employees

Onboard and manage W-2 workers (hourly, salary, commissioned, and more) — compensation, banking, tax withholding, documents, and terminations.

---
## 📁 EmployeeOnboarding {#employee-onboarding}

Flows and blocks for onboarding employees.

```ts
import { EmployeeOnboarding } from '@gusto/embedded-react-sdk'
```

## 📁 EmployeeManagement {#employee-management}

Flows and blocks for managing an employee after onboarding.

```ts
import { EmployeeManagement } from '@gusto/embedded-react-sdk'
```

The set of questions is driven by the API response per state, so `form.Fields` is an array of state groups with discriminated, render-ready `Field` components rather than a fixed named object."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-federal-taxes-form","label":"✍️ useFederalTaxesForm","description":"Headless hook for updating an employee's federal tax (W-4) withholding information — filing status, multiple-jobs flag, dependents, other income, deductions, and extra withholding."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-home-address-form","label":"✍️ useHomeAddressForm","description":"Form hook for creating or editing an employee's home address."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-job-form","label":"✍️ useJobForm","description":"Headless hook for creating or updating an employee's job — title, hire date, S-Corp 2% shareholder flag, and Washington state workers' compensation fields."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-payment-method-form","label":"✍️ usePaymentMethodForm","description":"Headless React Hook Form hook for updating an employee's payment method."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-sign-employee-form","label":"✍️ useSignEmployeeForm","description":"Headless hook for signing an employee form — captures a typed signature, electronic consent, and (for I-9 forms) preparer/translator certification."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-split-payments-form","label":"✍️ useSplitPaymentsForm","description":"Headless React Hook Form hook for splitting an employee's Direct Deposit across multiple bank accounts."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-work-address-form","label":"✍️ useWorkAddressForm","description":"Form hook for creating or editing an employee's work address."}]} />
